Mark, the school trip is next week. Have you got everything ready?
Almost. I had my passport renewed, and I got my camera fixed yesterday.
Smart. I still need to have my glasses repaired before we go.
You should book it today. I am also having my shoes cleaned at the shop.
Good idea. Are you getting your suitcase checked too?
Yes, I am having the broken wheel replaced this afternoon. Then we are ready.

Hello, this is a message from City Tech Repair for Mark. We are calling about the laptop you brought in last week. The good news is that we have replaced the broken screen, and we have also had the battery checked by our technician. Everything is working perfectly now. While the laptop was here, we noticed that the keyboard was a little loose, so we got it fixed at no extra cost. Your computer is ready, and you can collect it any time before six o'clock. If you prefer, we can have it delivered to your home tomorrow morning. Please call us back to confirm. Thank you for choosing City Tech Repair, and have a great day.

Hi everyone, and welcome back to my channel. Next week my family is travelling to Japan, so this weekend I am getting everything done before we leave. First, I had my passport renewed at the office downtown, because the old one was about to expire. Then I got my hair cut, because I want to look nice in all the photos. This morning I took my phone to the shop, and I am having the cracked screen replaced. I also need to have my suitcase repaired, because one wheel is broken. Finally, my mother is getting the house cleaned before we go, so it feels fresh when we come back. Getting things done before a trip is a lot of work, but it feels great. See you in my next video from Tokyo.

First, you call the shop and explain the problem. Then, you make an appointment for the repair. Next, you take the item to the technician. After that, you have it fixed or replaced. Finally, you collect it and pay for the service.
